overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character with a large cargo backpack traversing a scenic canyon environment with red rock formations, tropical vegetation, and scattered dead sea creatures. The character moves steadily through varying terrain including rocky canyons, grassy hills, and areas with beached marine life.

events.description: character walks through shallow water pool in the canyon

agents.ego_description: character with large cargo backpack walking steadily through narrow rocky canyon

entered.detail: tall red rock formation forming the left wall of the canyon
tall red rock formation forming the right wall of the canyon
cluster of palm trees visible in the distance ahead
shallow pool of water on the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon with red rock walls on both sides. The path has shallow water pools and leads toward palm trees visible in the distance. The environment is enclosed with limited sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with scattered palm trees

events.description: exits narrow rocky canyon into open grassy hillside

agents.ego_description: character walking uphill on grassy terrain, moving away from the canyon

entered.detail: green grassy slope replacing the rocky canyon walls
narrow dirt trail winding through the grass

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the character leaves the canyon and ascends a grassy hillside. The red rock walls give way to green grass and scattered palm trees. The sky becomes fully visible as the character follows a dirt path upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open valley with palm trees and scattered rocks

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through open grassy valley surrounded by palm trees

entered.detail: wide open valley floor covered in green grass
large rocks scattered across the grassy terrain

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a wide open grassy valley with palm trees scattered throughout. The terrain is mostly flat with some scattered boulders. Red rock formations are visible in the distance to the left as the character continues along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon with beached sea creatures

events.description: dead sea creatures become visible on the rocks to the right

agents.ego_description: character walking downhill through rocky terrain, passing large dead sea creatures

entered.detail: tall red rock wall forming the left side of the canyon
large dead black whale-like creature lying on the rocks

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a rocky area where the grass gives way to red rock and dirt. Large dead sea creatures are scattered on the rocks to the right. The canyon walls close in again as the character continues through the rugged terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that leads a character from a confined red rock canyon out into a wide grassy valley before descending back into a rugged, debris-strewn gorge. It begins within narrow canyon walls where shallow water pools line the path toward distant palm trees under a sliver of sky. As the character exits the enclosure, the scene opens up and ascends a grassy hillside, shifting from red stone to vibrant greenery and a fully visible sky. The camera then traverses a wide, flat valley scattered with boulders and palm trees, keeping the distant red formations to the left. Finally, the terrain shifts back to red rock and dirt as the character descends into a closing canyon, passing large dead sea creatures scattered across the rocks.
